description: Happy path: DIY renter topic with platform and format context returns high-confidence Renter primary persona

input.topic: removable wallpaper accent wall for a small rental bedroom

expect.topic: removable wallpaper accent wall for a small rental bedroom
expect.secondary_personas: array present, may include New Homeowner
expect.fit_rationale: non-empty string explaining why Renter is strongest fit
expect.adaptation_notes: all five persona keys present; Renter value is non-null with reversibility/landlord-safe framing; irrelevant personas set to null

prohibit: primary_persona other than Renter for a rental-explicit topic
any adaptation_notes key missing from the five-persona set
confidence low when topic, pillar, platform, and format are all provided
fabricated engagement or analytics data in fit_rationale

description: Minimal input: topic only with no pillar, platform, or format returns reduced confidence with explanation

input.topic: thrift store furniture haul and styling

expect.topic: thrift store furniture haul and styling
expect.confidence: medium or low due to missing platform and format context
expect.confidence_note: non-null string explaining that missing platform or format reduced confidence

prohibit: confidence high when platform and format are both omitted
confidence_note null when confidence is below high
any adaptation_notes key omitted rather than set to null

description: Edge case: ambiguous topic that spans multiple personas returns low confidence with honest rationale

input.topic: budget-friendly holiday decor ideas for any home

expect.secondary_personas: non-empty array containing at least Renter or New Homeowner given budget and any-home framing
expect.fit_rationale: explains the multi-persona overlap and why Holiday Maximalist edges others
expect.adaptation_notes: multiple personas have non-null values reflecting the broad appeal

prohibit: empty secondary_personas for a broad topic that spans multiple personas
fabricated audience analytics or engagement predictions
adaptation_notes values that contradict the persona definitions in audience-engine
